hero.subtitle: We carry out seed ball planting with drone technology. Thanks to unmanned aerial vehicles, we reduce land disturbance to zero and preserve wildlife on steep terrain.

valueCards.title: Three Principles, One Vision
valueCards.subtitle: These three principles are at the core of all our projects.

zeroFootprint.title: Zero Ground Footprint
zeroFootprint.description: We green nature with technology. Using drone technology, we carry out seed ball planting operations. With unmanned aerial vehicles, we reduce land disturbance to zero and preserve wildlife in steep terrain.

transparentSupply.title: Transparent Supply Chain
transparentSupply.description: Our regionally-suited seeds are sourced from the relevant Regional Forestry Directorates; species, collection dates, and origin of every seed are securely verified by blockchain technology.

annualReport.title: Annual Drone Reporting
annualReport.description: Periodic flight data, growth metrics and your carbon neutralization results are updated live on our corporate dashboard and can be exported directly to your ESG reports.

howItWorks.title: Four Steps to
howItWorks.subtitle: End-to-end science and technology, from seed selection to ESG reporting.

research.title: Seed Ball R&D
research.description: We work with our expert forest engineers and academic advisors to drive ecosystem restoration and the rehabilitation of burned areas and mining sites. We develop our seed ball formulas in line with forestry science — selecting seeds suited to the region's climate and ecology and coating them with the most appropriate materials.

analysis.title: Target Site Analysis
analysis.description: Our application analyses satellite and drone (UAV) imagery to study the site's topography, soil moisture and ecosystem structure. It uses artificial intelligence to determine the most suitable target points for seed ball drops. Coordinated with the Regional Forestry Directorate, all legal permits are obtained to make the afforestation process fully scientific and safe.

distribution.title: Drone Distribution
distribution.description: Guided by high-precision GPS data, our UAV fleet delivers 200+ seed balls in a single flight to pre-optimized target points — flawlessly and with zero ecological impact.

monitoring.title: Annual Monitoring & ESG
monitoring.description: Vegetation growth data tracked through annual UAV photogrammetry and real-time carbon offset metrics on the corporate dashboard are available instantly. Ready to be integrated into ESG reporting workflows.

impactTabs.subtitle: We create measurable change in three critical ecosystem domains, powered by science and technology.

fire.label: Post-Fire
fire.title: Regreening Burned Forests
fire.description: To restore the ecological dynamics of burned forest land, we run large-scale, fast and sustainable reforestation campaigns using autonomous drone fleets and high-germination seed balls.
bullets: Worker safety: Avoids risking lives on loose, landslide-prone terrain after fires
Golden time window: Rapid intervention before topsoil loses nutrients or erosion begins
GIS-driven homogeneous distribution: Seed density per m² is finely tuned
Digital traceability: Every coordinate is logged, germination is monitored from satellites
fire.detailIntro: The scientific foundation of UAV + seed ball rehabilitation in burned areas:

items.title: Labor Savings
items.description: Work that would take hundreds of laborers weeks of manual planting is completed by autonomous drone fleets in a fraction of the time.

items.title: Worker Safety
items.description: Planting is carried out on loose post-fire soil, fallen trees and landslide-prone terrain without putting human lives at risk.

items.title: Protective Coating
items.description: The clay, compost and nutrients inside seed balls shield the seed from birds, rodents and ants.

items.title: Micro-Habitat Support
items.description: The seed ball carries the moisture and organic nutrients needed for germination right in its first layer.

items.title: Natural Adaptation
items.description: Because seeds are not buried deep in the soil, they germinate at the right time and in their natural cycle, together with the rain.

items.title: Speed and Wide-Area Coverage
items.description: A single drone can drop thousands of seed balls homogeneously over a wide hectarage in a day.

items.title: Lower Cost
items.description: Optimizes reforestation budgets by removing seedling growing, transport, hole digging and planting labor costs.

items.title: Critical Time Management
items.description: Allows fast intervention right after the fire — in the critical "golden window" before the soil loses nutrients and erosion begins.

items.title: GIS and Mapping Integration
items.description: Thanks to 3D maps prepared in advance, seeds are not dropped randomly but placed precisely on micro-basins and moist points where germination probability is highest.

items.title: Homogeneous Distribution
items.description: Sensors and autonomous algorithms finely tune the seed count per m²; over-density or gaps are prevented.

items.title: Digital Traceability
items.description: Since drop coordinates are logged in the system, germination success and vegetation development are easily tracked by satellites or drones in the following months.

detailGroups.title: Maximum Restoration with Minimum Environmental Footprint

items.title: Soil Protection
items.description: Prevents heavy machinery and intense human traffic from compacting the soil, protecting the post-fire sensitive topsoil from erosion.

items.title: Ecosystem-Friendly
items.description: Using only native flora seeds preserves the region's natural gene pool and supports ecological succession without disruption.

mining.label: Mining Sites
mining.title: Ecological Restoration of Mining Sites
mining.description: We accelerate the restoration of sites whose natural structure, vegetation and soil quality have been disturbed by mining. Using remote sensing and AI, we boost vegetation success in degraded topographies, building a gradual and sustainable forest ecosystem.
bullets: 200+ seeds per drone flight — 10× faster than traditional methods
Zero ground footprint: maximum restoration with the smallest environmental footprint
Full transparency: seed species, origin and germination rates logged end-to-end
Annual monitoring: high-resolution digital data via periodic drone flights
Corporate integration: every sale on your e-commerce site flows straight into your ESG reports via API
Legal compliance: 100% compliant, coordinated with Regional Forestry Directorates

carbon.label: Carbon Neutral
carbon.title: End-to-End Carbon Neutrality for Holdings and Companies
carbon.description: We calculate your annual greenhouse gas emissions to international standards, build high-carbon-sink areas (bio-carbon ecosystems) with drone technology, and integrate the entire process transparently into your ESG reports. By providing API integration between our corporate dashboard and your ESG software, we automate the data flow.
bullets: Corporate carbon footprint assessment — to international standards
Brand-dedicated forest, supported by drone technology
Data ready for ESG, GRI, CDP reports — automatic flow via API

footer.tagline: We plant the future with seed balls. Measurable reforestation through drone technology, forestry science, and a transparent supply chain.

ourSeeds.breadcrumbSubtitle: Each seed is chosen for the climate and ecosystem of its region. The properties of the five native species used in Skytech Green seed ball projects.
ourSeeds.sectionSubtitle: Each species is matched to the climate and soil of its planting region. Our seeds are sourced from Republic of Türkiye Regional Forestry Directorates.
ourSeeds.footnote: Our regionally-suited seeds are sourced from the relevant Regional Forestry Directorates; species, collection dates, and origin of every seed are securely verified by blockchain technology.
